case.source: SoCal job playbooks 'Playbook: Garage-to-ADU Conversion' (full 16-step arc)
case.description: Convert the existing detached 2-car garage into a permitted ADU — studio layout with a kitchenette and a full bathroom, for a family member to live in.

required.label: Electrical panel + sewer/water lateral capacity check
Demo garage door opening / frame infill wall

lines: Measure existing garage and take pictures.
Measure and design new ADU layout: studio living area, kitchenette, and full bathroom.
Prepare survey of property line, and mark.
Engineer and calculate frame and support for converted structure.
Prepare sketch for customer to be approved and signed.
Prepare blueprints to be approved by the city.
Prepare soil report and geological report if necessary.
Pull city permits.
Cover all working areas.
Remove existing garage door and track, clean up and haul away debris.
Demo interior surfaces, floors, and any damaged wood as needed.
Haul away trash.
Frame in existing garage door opening with new exterior wall assembly.
Frame new window and door openings per approved plans.
Frame interior partition walls to separate kitchenette, bathroom, and studio living area.
Frame niche/bench in shower (customer will choose).
Prepare framing and subfloor, replace damaged wood.
Insulate exterior and interior walls and ceiling per code.
Run and install new copper water supply pipes up to code to new kitchenette and bathroom.
Run new drain, waste and vent lines up to code and connect to sewer lateral.
Install new valve in shower, toilet, kitchenette sink, and vanity.
Install new p-trap and drain cover for shower.
Install toilet and install new ring wax.
Connect kitchenette sink plumbing, connect faucet and garbage disposal.
Install foam insulation on all exposed hot water pipes.
Install new dedicated subpanel/circuit as required to serve the ADU.
Install all outlets to be GFI.
Install light fixtures (LED light, recessed lighting, shower light).
Install exhaust fan ceiling in bathroom.
Install dedicated circuits for kitchenette appliances.
Install ductless mini-split system circuit for heating and cooling of habitable space.
Install waterproof paper and chicken wire where tile goes around shower walls and shower floor.
Install cement on the paper and chicken wire.
Apply hot mop all shower area + water test for 24 hours.
Install tile on shower walls and floor.
Apply grout.
Apply sealer on tile.
Fix all drywall in bathroom, kitchenette, and studio area.
Apply primer and paint throughout unit.
Paint trim around walls/baseboards.
Create cabinet sketch layout for kitchenette.
Build cabinets (customer will select design and colors).
Install new countertop.
Install backsplash.
Install new sink.
Install new faucet and garbage disposal.
Install back all appliances (compact refrigerator, cooktop, microwave-hood).
Install vanity with countertop and sink, connect faucet.
Install medicine cabinet upon request.
Install mirror.
Install grab bars per request.
Install shower head and all fixtures.
Install shower door or curtains.
Install toilet fixtures, vanity knobs.
Fix subfloor as needed.
Install tile floor in bathroom and kitchenette (level surface, floating cement, tile, grout, sealer).
Install wood/laminate floor in studio living area (customer will choose material).
Install new baseboards throughout unit.
Prime and paint baseboards.
Remove existing garage window(s), clean up and haul away debris.
Install new retro-fitted or new-construction vinyl/aluminum windows per approved plans (customer to select color).
Install new entry door.
Apply 50-year caulking all around window and door frames.
Install tar paper and wire mesh, apply cement scratch coat and brown coat, apply stucco color coat to match existing exterior.
Schedule and pass rough inspections: plumbing, electrical, framing, hot mop, walls.
Schedule and pass final inspection.
Clean up and haul away debris.
Clean entire job site.

notes: Assumed ductless mini-split for heating/cooling since equipment was not specified — confirm unit size/count with client.
Assumed existing electrical service needs a new subpanel to feed the ADU — confirm main panel capacity before bid.
Assumed a walk-in shower (no tub) for the full bathroom per studio ADU norms — confirm with client.
Assumed sewer/water lines can tie into existing house lines near the garage — confirm during rough plumbing walk.

groundedOn.title: Flooring: Wood floor / Engineered wood / Bamboo / Laminate / Waterproof laminate — scope of work
Patio Cover: Wood (Waterproof and Lattice) — scope of work
Windows: Vinyl & Aluminum (Retro-Fit) — scope of work
Air duct replacement — scope of work
